settings.title: ToC Settings
settings.api_key_placeholder: There's built-in keys, or use your own
settings.page_labels_hint: Defines the page labels shown by PDF viewers
settings.page_labels_disabled_multi_range: Disabled when multiple ToC ranges are added
settings.model_base_url_required: Enter the custom provider Base URL first
settings.models_loaded: {count} models loaded. Choose from the model fields.
settings.model_picker_no_provider: Choose a provider in Settings first
settings.provider_hint: Switching provider fills default models; you can still edit them
settings.default_models_hint: Default models are filled for this provider. Use Fetch Models to load more.
settings.auto_provider_hint: Auto uses server defaults; no model selection needed

msg.pdf_loaded: Pdf loaded, long press and drag to select ToC pages

toc.prompt_intro:
The 'AI Format' button is used when the book lacks a scanned table of contents. Paste the unformatted text into the box, and it will intelligently convert it to the target format.

Alternatively, you can use the following prompt to generate the formatted text yourself:

1 Food Categories I Love 1
2 Fruits 2
2.1 Strawberry 3

Reformat the table of contents below into the target format and remove unnecessary comments 

${YOUR_TOCS_COPY_FROM_ANYWHERE}
toc.nav_hint: Use up and down arrow keys for quick navigation
toc.outline_placeholder:
1. Please load your PDF first
2. Drag to select the ToC page range
3. Click the Generate ToC button above
toc.promote_selected_hint: Move selected items up one level
toc.demote_selected_hint: Move selected items down one level
toc.offset_selected_hint: Adjust the page-number offset for the selected items

hint.multi_select_tip: Tip: hold Shift and click to select a range of TOC items.

tooltip.generate_ai: Generate ToC from selected pages using AI
tooltip.switch_edit: Switch to Edit Mode (Show Original PDF)
tooltip.switch_preview: Switch to Preview Mode (Show Generated PDF)
tooltip.export_chapters: Export selected chapters from the original PDF

chapter_export.title: Export Chapters
chapter_export.description: Select chapters to export. Page offsets are applied automatically.

save.replace_source_confirm: Replace "{filename}" in its original location? Choose Cancel to save a copy.

dropzone.title: Upload Your PDF
dropzone.subtitle: Drag & drop a file here, or

help.title: How to Use Tocify
help.step_upload_desc: Drop a PDF into the preview area or choose one from disk.
help.step_select_desc: Drag on the page grid to mark the pages that contain the table of contents.
help.step_edit_desc: Use AI generation or manual editing, then adjust levels, titles, page numbers, and styles.
help.step_export_desc: Preview the generated document and export the full PDF or selected chapters.

offset.title: Confirm Page Offset By The First ToC Item
offset.instruction: Select the physical page where this chapter actually begins
offset.skip_tooltip: Skip this item if it's not actually part of the table of contents (e.g. preface or other irrelevant content) and use the next one as the base.

error.too_many_pages: Too many pages selected. Max allowed is {max} pages.
error.payload_too_large: Total size too large (>5MB). Please reduce page range or lower resolution.
error.try_other_model: {provider}: {message} You can try other model in API settings.
error.not_a_toc: The selected pages don't look like a ToC. Please try adjusting the page range.
error.request_too_large: Request too large. Please reduce the page range or lower the resolution.
error.daily_limit_exceeded: Daily limit exceeded. Please try again tomorrow or input your own API key in API settings.
error.needs_api_key: Please add your own API key in API Settings to continue.

toast.load_failed: Failed to load core components. Please refresh and try again.
toast.components_not_loaded: Components not loaded. Please reupload your file.
toast.toc_insert_hint: ToC pages will be inserted at page {page}. You can change it in Settings.
toast.pdf_corrupted: The PDF structure is too old or corrupted to generate a preview.
toast.raw_toc_imported: The raw ToC has been imported from the PDF.
toast.no_pdf_to_export: Error: No PDF document to export.
toast.no_chapters_selected: Please select at least one chapter to export.
toast.no_valid_toc: We could not find a valid ToC on these pages.
toast.source_replace_denied: Write permission was not granted for the original file.
